CreditSherpa.description: Pulls and consolidates credit reports across all major and alternative bureaus for financial verification.

DisputeForge.description: Generates dispute letters and formal violation complaints using FDPA and CFPB standards.

DebtSentinel.description: Verifies debt collection practices against FDCPA and purchase agreement compliance standards.

BureauRadar.description: Surveys alternative credit bureaus like LexisNexis and Innovis for shadow credit activity.

DunStream.description: Submits verified tradelines and payment activity to Dun & Bradstreet to build enterprise credit.

GrantCortex.description: Evaluates grant eligibility using fraud telemetry, financial velocity, and compliance metadata. Outputs reasoning with simulated risk calculations.
